hero.heading: Academic environment for real life.
hero.subtext: We built Polyglot International School in Samarkand around three main priorities of parents: strong education, absolute safety, and the right life values for children.
hero.heading2: A place where every child's potential comes to life.
hero.subtext2: A modern campus, caring teachers, and a supportive atmosphere help children grow confident and curious.
hero.heading3: The future begins with the right choice of school.
hero.subtext3: International learning standards and genuine care for every student are at the heart of everything we do at Polyglot International School.

certificates.heading: International certificates without tutors
certificates.body: We guide every student to clear, measurable academic results recognised worldwide. The programme is built so that preparation for international exams becomes a natural part of everyday study.
certificates.bodyExtra: No evening tutors, no weekends buried in textbooks. Language modules, academic writing and mathematics are woven into the schedule — a child arrives at the exam fully prepared, without overload or stress.
certificates.item1: Direct preparation for IELTS (target 7.0+), SAT (1400+) and HSK (Chinese language).
certificates.item2: Official exams are taken directly at school, in a calm environment for the child.
certificates.item3: Personalised tracks: difficulty adapts to each individual student.
certificates.item4: Transparent progress analytics — parents see results in real time.
certificates.boyAlt: Students in a music lesson — Polyglot International School
certificates.girlAlt: Student in Polyglot International School uniform

schoolChoice.heading: Choosing a school is not choosing a building or a programme.

features.heading: Readiness for business and adult life.
features.subtext: The school doesn't isolate a child from society — it develops practical independence and social intelligence.
features.card1Body: Weekly meetings and networking with active entrepreneurs and top managers.
features.card2Body: Financial literacy, marketing, podcast creation and public speaking.
features.card3Body: Etiquette, cultural behavior and communication in any environment.

campus.heading: A building as a promise. Every detail is a design decision, not a coincidence.
campus.body: We built the campus around the question: «What should surround a child so that 11 years at school become a time of growth, not survival?» Earthquake-resistant construction, individual transport, laboratories for real experiments — these aren't features, they're basic environmental hygiene.
campus.stat1Label: Five floors in the centre of Samarkand
campus.imageAlt: Aerial view of Polyglot International School campus — Samarkand

founder.heading: A school founded by people who went through this path themselves.
founder.para1: Polyglot was founded by {name} — a graduate of {unis}, with managerial and public sector experience focused on education as a strategic resource.
founder.founderUnis: Harvard, University of Edinburgh and Viadrina
founder.para2: The school team are specialists with international practice ({unis}) and over a decade of experience in school education.
founder.photoAlt: Shokhrukh Kudratov — founder of Polyglot International School

enrollment.heading: Enrolment for 2026–2027 academic year is open.
enrollment.body: Testing via the state programme for transfer to any grade; for Grade 1 — a conversation with a psychologist.

footer.tagline: A premium private school in Samarkand. We nurture strong, educated, globally-minded individuals from grades 1 to 11.
footer.enrollmentNote: Enrolment for 2026/27 academic year is open.
